programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: The Royal Rumble is one of the wildest events on the WWE calendar; and in the intense decade of the 2000s, great Rumble moments were etched in history, featuring the unforgettable WWE Championship match between Cactus Jack and Triple H, Santino Marella breaking a record for the shortest entrant, John Cena and Batista's epic battle in 2005 and much more!

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior's energy ran through professional wrestling like none before him and his legacy will live forever; with moments like body slamming Andre the Giant inside Madison Square Garden, the unforgettable career-ending match against Randy Savage, the iconic title for title match against Hulk Hogan at WrestleMania 6, the intensity of Warrior will always be unmistakable.
